task_completion.description: A Market Analyzer window is open in NinjaTrader 8
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a window titled 'Market Analyzer' within the NinjaTrader 8 interface.

task_completion.description: SPY, AAPL, and MSFT are added to the Market Analyzer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'SPY', 'AAPL', and 'MSFT' listed in the Instrument column (rows) of the Market Analyzer window.
Look for a column header labeled 'Last' in the Market Analyzer.
Look for a column header labeled 'Net Change' in the Market Analyzer.
Look for a column header labeled 'RSI' or 'RSI(...)' in the Market Analyzer.

task_completion.description: The RSI indicator is set to a 14-period
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '14' in the RSI column header (e.g., 'RSI(14)') or in an open indicator configuration dialog.

task_completion.description: The NinjaTrader workspace has been saved
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bottom right corner of the NinjaTrader Control Center; the workspace name should be visible without an unsaved indicator (like an asterisk or greyed-out state), or look for a 'Save Workspace' dialog/action in the recent screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to configure the Market Analyzer
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the NinjaTrader 8 application interface, menus, and dialog boxes being interacted with.

integrity.description: The Market Analyzer displays actual numerical data, not empty cells
integrity.visual_evidence: The columns for Last, Net Change, and RSI should contain numbers for SPY, AAPL, and MSFT, proving the real OHLCV data is being processed.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by editing workspace XML files directly
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no text editors (like Notepad or VS Code) open editing NinjaTrader workspace XML files to artificially create the configuration.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified requirements for NinjaTrader 8 Market Analyzer: 1) Instruments must be exactly SPY, AAPL, and MSFT. 2) Required columns are 'Last' (Last price), 'Net Change', and 'RSI'. 3) The RSI indicator must use the standard 14-period parameter (often visible as RSI(14) in the column header). 4) The environment contains real Yahoo Finance daily OHLCV data covering 502 trading days from Jan 2023 to Dec 2024, so the Market Analyzer columns should display populated numerical data, not empty or N/A values.
